## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / algorithm
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test / benchmark

## Standards and references

Which GOST standard, RFC, or test vectors does this touch?

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` passes (if available)
- [ ] New code is covered by tests (including KAT vectors for crypto code)
- [ ] Public API changes are documented in godoc and `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] No new external dependencies (stdlib only)
